name: Joel Grey
description: American actor, singer, dancer, director, and photographer (born 1932)
abstract: Joel Grey (born Joel David Katz; April 11, 1932) is an American actor, singer, dancer, photographer, and theatre director. He is best known for portraying the Master of Ceremonies in the musical Cabaret on Broadway and in Bob Fosse's 1972 film adaptation.

about_quotes.speaker: Sherrie Maricle
about_quotes.evidence: I was subbing for one of my friends on a stage part to the “Cabaret” revival, which was I think it was in ’89, with Joel Grey.
